summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive item was detected, no PR is a boring duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout candidate, and merge/fix/raise-PR actions are blocked by the job. Two PRs need explicit maintainer judgment before any next step.
